review: Great plans, easy to follow. Built two of the designs already and both came out real well. Good clear measurements.
Good detail in the PDF. Printed these out and they worked real well in the shop. The cut list saved me a lot of measuring time.
Solid plans. Some of the angles could be called out a bit clearer but I figured it out. Chair came out fine. Good value for the price.
Real nice box plans. I made this for my granddaughter and she loves it. The dovetail layout was drawn out well, made it easy to transfer to the wood.
Best workbench plans I have come across. No pocket screws, proper joinery throughout. This is how a bench should be built. Already have mine about halfway done.
Good plans for the barn owl box. Put one up out back already. Dimensions look right for a nesting pair. Well thought out ventilation holes included.
Six coordinated birdhouses, all different enough to be interesting. I have already cut the parts for three of them. Good instructions and the PDF is clear even printed in black and white.
Shelf plans were exactly what I needed for the garage project. Step-by-step was clear and the materials list was accurate. Already built one set.
Frame plans worked out well. Had to adjust the rabbet depth slightly for my wood but that is not unusual. Overall a good set of plans at a fair price.
Carolina wren box came out perfect. Hung it on the fence post last Saturday and already have a bird checking it out. Good entrance hole size specified.
Decent Adirondack chair plans. The rounding on the back slats was a little tricky to cut freehand but the seller answered my question same day. Chair is solid.
Keepsake box plans with sliding lid were well drawn out. Used cedar. Made one for my wife and one for my daughter Janelle. Both turned out real nice.
Purple martin house plans are detailed and the dimensions are spot on. Used pine from Home Depot. Took about two weekends. Getting it painted now.
Solid raised planter bed plans. Cut list was perfect and the corner joinery held up through a wet spring. Grew tomatoes and peppers in it this year.
Workshop storage cabinet plans are thorough. Took me longer than the estimate but that is on me. Drawers slide smooth. Good use of scrap oak I had lying around.
Bluebird box plans are right sized. Entry hole at 1.5 inches like it should be. Already have a pair nesting. Best five dollars I have spent in a while.
Footstool plans were simple and clear. Good first project for practicing mortise and tenon. Gift for my son Curtis. He was happy with it.
Rolling tool cart plans are well done. Used plywood from Home Depot. The dado joints in the drawer runners are shown clearly. Cart rolls smooth on the concrete floor.
Porch swing plans are solid but the hardware list was a little vague on bolt sizes. Worked it out. Swing is hanging and sturdy. Good plans overall.
Cedar planter box bundle was a good buy. Three different sizes included. Built the medium one first and it came out level and square. Will do the others this fall.
